title: HCSS Meeting - TGI Fridays | Crunchtime - Weekly Accounting Integration Working Session
raw_body:
Justin Harmon has shared notes from HCSS Meeting - TGI Fridays | Crunchtime - Weekly Accounting Integration Working Session, Nov 12 . The HCSS Meeting at TGI Fridays focused on the weekly accounting integration. Only one location went live, while 1191 and 1887 were rescheduled due to equipment delays. The team decided not to use the inventory delta for integration due to missing details like class and business unit. Vendor bills and standard exports are being processed. Location transfers are pending, likely facing the same class issue. The team agreed to cancel weekly meetings and reconvene when ready for the go-live transition from the sandbox to production. The meeting concluded with no further action items.

                                        <editable name="preheader">Justin Harmon has shared notes from HCSS Meeting - TGI Fridays | Crunchtime - Weekly Accounting Integration Working Session, Nov 12 . The HCSS Meeting at TGI Fridays focused on the weekly accounting integration. Only one location went live, while 1191 and 1887 were rescheduled due to equipment delays. The team decided not to use the inventory delta for integration due to missing details like class and business unit. Vendor bills and standard exports are being processed. Location transfers are pending, likely facing the same class issue. The team agreed to cancel weekly meetings and reconvene when ready for the go-live transition from the sandbox to production. The meeting concluded with no further action items.</editable>
